pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 15-17, 36; export_result.sh lines 37, 45; SQL commands target /command/demodb/sql endpoint
export_result.sh line 16: OUTPUT_PATH=/home/ga/suspicious_travelers.json; task.json description confirms this path
setup_task.sh lines 133-136: ground_truth_path written during seed_anomalies.py execution; export_result.sh line 49: GROUND_TRUTH_PATH=/var/lib/orientdb/ground_truth_anomalies.json

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic OrientDB database named 'demodb' that is procedurally generated during task setup via seed_demodb.py (creating base schema with real hotel/restaurant names and coordinates) and further customized by seed_anomalies.py (creating 3 fraudulent profiles with deliberately overlapping hotel stays across different cities). The agent must flag these profiles in the database by setting Suspicious=true and output results to /home/ga/suspicious_travelers.json. Ground truth anomalies are stored at /var/lib/orientdb/ground_truth_anomalies.json and contain the email addresses of the 3 seeded fraudulent profiles (deterministically selected via random.seed(42)).
